name: University Bus Co
registry_source: NJ Division of Revenue (could not confirm entity record via web; principals/officers per third-party NJ business directory listing)
notes: No SAFER record found for 'University Bus' or 'University Bus Co' under that name. The operating address 18-02 River Rd, Fair Lawn NJ 07410 is the same as Scholastic Bus Co Inc (USDOT 1129111 / MC-208432), which SAFER lists as INACTIVE; phone (201) 791-9699 vs Scholastic (201) 300-4100. University Bus appears to be a related/sister or successor brand at the same Wendell Realty property (per 1999 NJ Appellate case Scholastic Bus Co Inc / Sylvia Roehrich T/A Wendell Realty v. Fair Lawn ZBA), but operating-carrier USDOT could not be confirmed. NJ SOS / Division of Revenue online portal returned no scrapable result for 'University Bus' from public web (njportal pages returned 404 to anonymous crawlers).

name: Palmer Bus Svc Of Maple River
carrier_operation: School Bus, Private Passenger (Business), Intrastate Only (Non-HM)
fmcsa_address: 204 1ST AVE S, AMBOY, MN 56010 (mailing PO BOX 2026, MANKATO, MN 56002)
inc_date: 2008 (Maple River division opened 2008; parent Palmer Bus Service founded 1974 in St. Clair MN)
officers: Jenna Fromm (CEO, parent Palmer Bus Service Inc; ownership transferred 2012 from founders Floyd & Lois Palmer to daughters Hollie Johnson and Jenna Fromm)
entity_status: active (parent company per company website; MN SOS record not retrievable from public web crawl)
registry_source: Minnesota Secretary of State Office of Business Filings (entity detail not accessible to anonymous web crawl); company history per palmerbusservice.com and Wikipedia/CPTDB
notes: SAFER snapshot for PALMER BUS SERVICE OF MAPLE RIVER INC (USDOT 1772602) is a clean match on name and operating area. Input address '201 8th Ave NE, Mapleton, MN 56065' matches the Mapleton terminal listed on company website; SAFER principal place of business is the Amboy terminal (204 1st Ave S, Amboy). Power Units 38, Drivers 35. No on-file FMCSA safety rating. MCS-150 dated 03/13/2020. 0 crashes, 0 OOS in last 24 months. This subsidiary operates the Maple River School District #2135 contract (~700 students/day across Mapleton, Amboy, Good Thunder, Minnesota Lake).

name: AC School Svc Inc
carrier_operation: unknown (likely intrastate school bus contractor - no interstate operations evident, so possibly no USDOT required)
officers: unknown (operationally tied to Anderson Coach & Travel / O.D. Anderson family - Anderson Coach School Bus Services lists same physical address 13570 PA-18 Conneaut Lake)
entity_status: unknown (PA Dept of State business search portal not accessible via anonymous web crawl)
registry_source: Pennsylvania Department of State Bureau of Corporations and Charitable Organizations (entity record not retrievable via public web search)
notes: SAFER lookups for 'AC SCHOOL SERVICE' and 'A C SCHOOL' returned no records under that name - this carrier likely operates intrastate-only school bus service that does not require a USDOT number, OR is registered under a different legal name. The 13570 State Highway 18, Conneaut Lake PA 16316 address is shared with 'Anderson Coach School Bus Services' (school bus division of Anderson Coach & Travel of Greenville PA, founded 1937 by O.D. Anderson), suggesting AC School Service Inc is either the legal corporate name of the Anderson school-bus subsidiary serving the Conneaut Area School District, or a closely related/affiliated entity at the same terminal. Website goschoolbus.com redirects to goanderson.com. Phone (814) 382-1281.

name: A A Transportation Co Inc
fmcsa_address: 605 Hartford Turnpike, Shrewsbury, MA 01545 (mailing PO Box 639, Shrewsbury, MA 01545)
registry_source: MA Secretary of the Commonwealth Corporations Division (entity detail not directly retrievable via anonymous web crawl); incorporation date and officers per Better Business Bureau profile, which sources MA Corporations Division
notes: Carrier name and USDOT match. Input address 174 W Main St, East Brookfield MA 01515 is the East Brookfield Division (one of 6 AA Transportation MA terminals: Shrewsbury HQ, Lake St Shrewsbury, Webster, Rutland/Wachusett, East Brookfield, Leicester). SAFER reports 378 power units, 384 drivers - large fleet consistent with the multi-terminal operation. MC-311149 for-hire passenger/property authority. Satisfactory rating dated 10/10/2024 (most recent review 03/03/2026). Safety record last 24 months: 42 vehicle inspections, 3 driver inspections, 0 OOS, 10 crashes (1 injury, 9 tow-aways, 0 fatal). MCS-150 filed 05/08/2025. Contract school bus service to 30+ Central MA districts; charters, special needs, McKinney-Vento.
